name: io.github.octoryn/octopus-blackboard
description: A shared memory and coordination layer for AI coding agents. Not an orchestrator — a blackboard. Local-first SQLite, tamper-evident timeline, provider-independent AI/human attribution.

environmentVariables.name: OCTOBOARD_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Identity the server writes under, e.g. "cursor" or "claude-code". Defaults to "anon".

environmentVariables.name: OCTOBOARD_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Explicit board directory. Omitted → the server discovers the nearest .octoboard/ by walking up from the working directory.
